docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CASHCALL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, EDWARD $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00, UPON PROOF OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, DEFENDANT MAY APPLY TO VACATE JUDGMENT, AND FOR ENTRY OF DISMISSAL.
